# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The latest released version of codux.nvim is supported.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please do not disclose it publicly through GitHub Issues.

Instead, contact the maintainer privately through GitHub so the issue can be investigated and resolved before public disclosure.

When reporting a vulnerability, please include:

- A description of the issue
- Steps to reproduce the problem
- Potential impact
- Any suggested remediation, if known

## Disclosure Process

1. The issue will be reviewed and validated.
2. A fix will be developed if necessary.
3. A new release will be published.
4. Public disclosure may occur after a fix is available.

## Scope

This policy applies to the codux.nvim plugin and its repository contents.
